## Meeting Purpose

[Review weekly performance and resolve data tracking issues.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline:** The topic pipeline is updated through January to cover key themes like AI agent evals and commercial comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [**Data Tracking Blocked:** Tracking competitor mentions (a key request from Jason) is blocked by a Scrunch platform limitation.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [**Scrunch Data Integrity:** Re-categorizing data in Scrunch is paused to prevent a potential data reset; Vivek is awaiting a response from the Scrunch team.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Meeting Schedule:** The sync will be async next week, then pause for the holidays, resuming in January.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)

## Topics

### Performance Update

  - [**December Performance:** Started strong, with the "testing AI agents" pillar page among the top 5 performers.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [**Cohort Performance:** Generally strong, with a minor dip in the "observability" cohort (noted as a weekly fluctuation).](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [**Keyword Rankings:** Competitor keyword rankings are stable, showing only minor declines.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [**LLM Referral Traffic:** Off to a good start for the month.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)

### Scrunch Data & Competitor Tracking

  - [**Problem:** Jason requested tracking for competitor mentions in third-party content (e.g., videos, side panels), specifically for the term "AI evals."](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Scrunch cannot provide this level of detail.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
      - [The dashboard shows a trend chart but lacks drill-down capability to view specific queries or content clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [**Interim Solution:** GrowthX is exploring internal workarounds and manual tracking via SEMrush, though SEMrush is not a definitive source of truth.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)

### Data Integrity & Site Navigation

  - [**Problem:** Re-categorizing citations in Scrunch (e.g., moving "Bronco" from "third-party" to "competitor") risks a full data reset.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Action:** Vivek has paused this task and is awaiting a definitive answer from the Scrunch team on a safe procedure.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Competitor List:** Vivek needs an updated list for Scrunch. The "Competitive Intelligence Master Document" (created by Connor \~3 months ago) was identified as the most current source.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [**Site Navigation:** To make room for new competitor pages (e.g., Maxim), the "Podcast" link will be removed from the "Resources" dropdown.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The podcast is now owned by Connor and is no longer updated by the team.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [Get a definitive answer from Scrunch on the safe data re-categorization process.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
      - [Recategorize Scrunch queries once a safe method is confirmed.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [**Galileo:**](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [Send the "Competitive Intelligence Master Document" link to Vivek.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [Request that Adeline remove the "Podcast" link from the "Resources" dropdown.](https://fathom.video/share/g7y2ZrdKpKPYhtvuZF85uM9Y14UrM3xj?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
